headline: Berkshire Stock Drops. Its Bargain-Priced Deal for Home Builder Fails to Impress Investors.
summary: Most home-building stocks have been weak in the past year, with Taylor Morrison trading near a 52-week low on Friday.

headline: Greg Abel just made his first big deal as Berkshire CEO. Why Warren Buffett is happy
summary: Berkshire's purchase of homebuilder Taylor Morrison gives the conglomerate a larger foothold in housing and appears to have been struck at a bargain valuation.

headline: Occidental Petroleum (OXY) Upgraded at Barclays, Price Target Raised by $13
summary: Occidental Petroleum Corporation (NYSE:OXY) is included among the 14 Best Oil and Gas Stocks to Buy According to Hedge Funds. headline: Berkshire Hathaway to Buy Taylor Morrison for $6.8 Billion
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Berkshire Hathaway Inc. will acquire Taylor Morrison Home Corp. in an all-cash deal worth about $6.8 billion, the first major purchase under chief executive Greg Abel and a vote of confidence in the US housing market.
